design_philosophy.core_loop: Simulate real-time soccer match with player-controlled team against AI opponent; select plays, move players, attempt to score goals
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Competitive goal-scoring against opposing team with limited player control over distributed team members
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Direct a soccer team to victory; experience of managing multiple players in real-time sports simulation
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Early faithful translation of soccer mechanics to video game format; prioritizes sport authenticity over arcade accessibility, resulting in complex simultaneous multi-player control scheme that constrains player agency

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Match outcome determined by strategic play selection and real-time multi-player coordination; no difficulty settings documented

progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential match progression against different opponents
replayability_hooks: Different opponent teams with varied play styles
Multiple play strategies to experiment with

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Soccer (NES, Famicom Disk System)
